{

Nifty +0.34% holding above 24K with 88 minutes to close. Defensive sectors (Pharma, FMCG) and capital goods/defence basket both bid — healthy breadth.",

    },

    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",

    {

    {

    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",

    },
    {

      "action": "MODIFY",

  "position_actions": [

    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,

    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,

    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,

    {

      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,

    },
    {
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN MIS BUY LIMIT @ 133.50 placed 565 min ago. CMP 138.51 — limit will not fill in current uptrend. Cancel pending order: it's MIS placed early morning, no longer relevant at 14:12 (cannot place new MIS after 14:30 either). Order hygiene: cancel stale pending."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "HFCL: pending MIS BUY @ 133.50 from morning is stale — should be cancelled (CMP 138.51, won't fill). Will not chase. SRF/AUROPHARMA/M&M/VEDL momentum noted but no entry today; book already at 54% deployed across 11 names. LALPATHLAB rejected (Q4 PAT -15% YoY, BEARISH research, intraday faded from 1615 to 1569).",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-diversified across 11 CNC positions, 54% deployed (room to add but no compelling new R:R given watchlist names mostly extended +5-10% intraday). Cluster check: 2 financial services (PNBHOUSING, ABCAPITAL) + CAMS (financial-adjacent) = ~13% capital, within limits. 2 defence/capital goods (HAL, GRSE, TITAGARH) = ~17% capital — at the threshold; no new defence adds today. Total unrealized +₹8K, realized -₹5K today. 5-day win rate 14% is poor — bias is to manage existing book tightly rather than stack new positions late in session. Cancelling stale HFCL pending order to clean book."
}
